title: President of Columbia
ticking_clock: Term-limited age 80. 10% per-round incapacitation risk. Legacy = reshaping world order.

title: Vice President of Columbia
ticking_clock: Succession race. Must balance loyalty to Dealer with own presidential ambitions.

title: Secretary of State
ticking_clock: Succession race. Cuba is personal trophy. Hawkish diplomatic establishment.

title: Secretary of Defense
ticking_clock: Overstretched military. Persia war consuming resources. Pacific deterrence at risk.

title: Director of Central Intelligence
ticking_clock: Controls what Dealer sees. Information is power.

title: Speaker of the Opposition
ticking_clock: Mid-terms Round 2. If opposition wins Seat 5 Parliament flips 3-2.

title: Presidential Candidate
ticking_clock: Presidential election Round 5. Every foreign leader hedges between Dealer and Challenger.

title: Presidential Envoy for Peace
ticking_clock: Expansion role. Parallel diplomatic channel may contradict official policy.

title: Presidential Envoy for Technology
ticking_clock: Expansion role. Tech tycoon with unaccountable influence.

title: Chairman of Cathay
ticking_clock: No successor. Age 72. 5-10% incapacitation risk. Legacy requires Formosa.

title: Marshal of Cathay
ticking_clock: Purge survivor. Co-signature required for military orders. Can slow-walk.

title: Premier of Cathay
ticking_clock: Controls real economic data. Hidden local debt crisis. Acting leader if Helmsman incapacitated.

title: Minister of Technology and Industry
ticking_clock: Global assets at risk if confrontation escalates. Rare earth weapon is depreciating.

title: Retired Senior Leader
ticking_clock: Activates when stability < 5 or support < 40%. Party immune system.

title: President of Gallia
ticking_clock: Strategic autonomy champion. UNSC veto. Nuclear power. Must balance EU/NATO/national interests.

title: Chancellor of Teutonia
ticking_clock: Massive Cathay trade dependency. Pressured to spend 5% GDP on defense. EU economic engine.

title: President of Freeland
ticking_clock: NATO frontline. Maximum hawk on Nordostan. Hosts Columbia forward deployments.

title: Prime Minister of Ponte
ticking_clock: EU weak link. Massive debt. Russia-sympathetic. China-curious. Can break EU consensus.

title: Prime Minister of Albion
ticking_clock: NATO but not EU. Five Eyes. UNSC veto. Post-Brexit bridge or orphan.

title: Commissioner of The Union
ticking_clock: Cannot vote but sets EU agenda. Nightmare: member states bypassing EU for bilateral deals.

title: President of Nordostan
ticking_clock: Personal survival depends on war producing something callable victory. Paranoid autocracy.

title: Chief of General Staff
ticking_clock: Can move against President if conditions align. Honest assessment vs. loyalty.

title: Minister of Economy
ticking_clock: Economic survival through deals. Back-channels to West. Sanctions evasion networks.

title: President of Heartland
ticking_clock: Exhausted wartime leader. Losing popularity. Fears abandonment by Columbia.

title: Commander-in-Chief
ticking_clock: More popular than Beacon. Believes better leadership = better outcomes. Wartime election candidate.

title: Opposition Leader
ticking_clock: Controversial pragmatist. Back-channel to Nordostan. Peace deal candidate.

title: Supreme Leader of Persia
ticking_clock: Theocratic hardline. Nuclear weapons as destiny. Proxy network as power.

title: Commander of Revolutionary Guard
ticking_clock: IRGC business empire. Nuclear capability as leverage not ideology. Kingmaker if Furnace weakens.

title: Reformist Leader
ticking_clock: Represents 60% of population under 30. Nuclear program as bargaining chip.

title: Prime Minister of Bharata
ticking_clock: Genuine third pole. Refuses alignment. Everyone needs something from Bharata.

title: Prime Minister of Levantia
ticking_clock: Regional military superpower. Can act unilaterally. Pulls Columbia into Middle East.

title: President of Formosa
ticking_clock: The most dangerous tripwire. Semiconductor chokepoint. TSMC leverage.

title: President of Phrygia
ticking_clock: NATO member playing every side. Controls Bosphorus. Maximum ambiguity.

title: Prime Minister of Yamato
ticking_clock: Remilitarizing. Pacific anchor. Could go nuclear. Columbia alliance cornerstone.

title: Crown Prince of Solaria
ticking_clock: Energy pricing superpower. OPEC+ leader. Hedging Columbia-Cathay.

title: Supreme Leader of Choson
ticking_clock: Nuclear wildcard. Unpredictable provocations. Can sell nuclear tech.

title: President of Hanguk
ticking_clock: Tech power. Threatened by Choson. Domestic political crisis. Cathay trade dependency.

title: Leader of Caribe
ticking_clock: Columbia's near-abroad. Post-intervention survival. Nordostan/Cathay lifeline.

title: Ruler of Mirage
ticking_clock: Financial hub. Arms buyer. Pragmatic hedger. Connects everyone.
